title: Bare Bones x Capybara Armor
description: A simple resource pack that replaces your armor with capybara armor, what could be better than that?
body:
Capybara Armor! replaces your typical Minecraft armor with some Capybara style ones... Are you really such a fan that you have a whole set of these?

CHANGING ARMORS V1.0:
- leather
- iron
- gold
- diamond
- netherite

Not fully compatible with trims yet

Part of the Capybara War set! 👑

- Recommended to bundle with the BareBones Texturepack for a better experience!
